G

GameBoard - Class in cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.models
GameBoard implements fundamental interactions dealing with the board This class is an implementation od IGameBoard invariant [pieces must abide by gravity, so there cannot be a space between two vertically placed tokens] AND [player 1 must have 0-1 more tokens than player 2]
GameBoard(int, int, int) - Constructor for class cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.models.GameBoard
Constructor for GameBoard class
GameBoardMem - Class in cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.models
GameBoardMem implements a memory-efficient version of IGameBoard.java A map is used to store tokens placed by the players and their related BoardPositions.
GameBoardMem(int, int, int) - Constructor for class cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.models.GameBoardMem
Constructs a GameBoardMem object with the chosen dimensions and win conditions.
GameScreen - Class in cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.views
Controls game flow
GameScreen() - Constructor for class cpsc2150.extendedConnectX.views.GameScreen
